content.json:
# SOCRadar MSSP Dashboard

Multi-tenant alarm monitoring across all managed companies.

parameters.name: CompanyName
parameters.query: SOCRadar_Alarms_CL | distinct CompanyName | order by CompanyName asc

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by CompanyName, Severity
| render barchart
content.title: Alarms by Severity per Company

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by Severity
| render piechart
content.title: Alarms by Severity

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by Status
| render piechart
content.title: Alarms by Status

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), CompanyName
| render timechart
content.title: Alarms Over Time by Company (Hourly)

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| summarize Companies=dcount(CompanyName), CompanyList=make_set(CompanyName) by AlarmMainType
| where Companies > 1
| order by Companies desc
| take 20
content.title: Threats Affecting Multiple Tenants

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| summarize LastAlarm=max(TimeGenerated), TotalAlarms=count(), HighSeverity=countif(Severity in ('HIGH', 'CRITICAL')) by CompanyName
| extend HoursSinceLastAlarm=datetime_diff('hour', now(), LastAlarm)
| order by HoursSinceLastAlarm desc
content.title: Tenant Health - Last Alarm per Company

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by AlarmMainType
| top 10 by Count
| render barchart
content.title: Top 10 Alarm Types

content.query:
SOCRadar_Alarms_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| project TimeGenerated, CompanyName, AlarmId, Severity, AlarmMainType, AlarmSubType, Title, Status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent Alarms (Last 50)

content.json:
---
### Audit Logs
If audit logging is enabled, you can monitor operations below.

content.query:
SOCRadarAuditLog_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| summarize Count=count() by EventType, CompanyName
| render barchart
content.title: Audit Events by Type and Company

content.query:
SOCRadarAuditLog_CL
| where '{CompanyName:label}' == 'All' or CompanyName == '{CompanyName}'
| project TimeGenerated, CompanyName, EventType, AlarmId, Message
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.title: Recent Audit Events
